$metadata.scope: Gate-2 FFET registry for 6.5E Delegation, Agreements, Evidence, and Disputes.
$metadata.title: 6.5E Composer FFET Registry v1

ffets.maximum_concrete_capability: Create DelegationGrant contracts for stage, workflow, workflow-tree, and department levels.
ffets.mcr: contracts:validate proves delegation scope, host consent, states, and audit hooks.
stop_conditions: required file outside exact_files
schema or migration change required without separate control pack
package or lockfile change required outside exact_files
invented primitive, API, permission, provider, ADL, or business rule
Composer parameter uses occupied P-26 through P-39
runtime/frontend implementation before Gate 3 approval
ffets.rollback_notes: Revert only this FFET branch/PR; do not revert unrelated Composer planning or previously merged subphase artifacts.

allowed: local import/export mismatch inside exact files
test expectation drift caused by active FFET
forbidden: schema/migration/package/lockfile changes unless exact_files owns them

expected_evidence: contracts:validate proves delegation scope, host consent, states, and audit hooks.
validation command output
PR URL and merge commit
updated subphase closure or audit artifact
